# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Core application infrastructure stack (VPC, EC2 Auto Scaling, RDS, S3, Load Balancer)

Parameters:
  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Default: app
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,30}$'
    Description: Prefix for resource naming

  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - test
      - prod

  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16

  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24
  PrivateDbSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24
  PrivateDbSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24

  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t4g.micro
      - t4g.small
      - t4g.medium

  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI for app instances (ensure compatible with InstanceType architecture)

  DesiredCapacity:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10

  MinSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10

  MaxSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 4
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 20

  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional EC2 key pair for SSH (leave blank to disable)
  EnableSSH:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Allow SSH from SSHLocationCIDR to app instances (only if KeyName provided)
  SSHLocationCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR allowed for SSH when enabled

  AppPort:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80

  DbEngine:
    Type: String
    Default: postgres
    AllowedValues: [postgres, mysql]

  DbEngineVersionPostgres:
    Type: String
    Default: '15.5'
  DbEngineVersionMySql:
    Type: String
    Default: '8.0.36'

  DbInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: db.t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - db.t3.micro
      - db.t3.small
      - db.t3.medium
      - db.t4g.micro
      - db.t4g.small
      - db.t4g.medium

  DbAllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    MinValue: 20
    MaxValue: 1024

  DbName:
    Type: String
    Default: appdb
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,62}$'

  DbMasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: appadmin
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,15}$'

  DbMasterPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    MinLength: 8
    MaxLength: 41

  MultiAZ:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']

  PublicAlbScheme:
    Type: String
    Default: internet-facing
    AllowedValues: [internet-facing, internal]

  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional fixed S3 bucket name (leave blank for autogenerated)

  EnableDeletionProtectionRDS:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']

  EnableDeletionProtectionALB:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]
  AllowSSH: !And
    - !Equals [!Ref EnableSSH, 'true']
    - !Condition UseKeyPair
  IsPostgres: !Equals [!Ref DbEngine, postgres]
  UseFixedBucketName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref S3BucketName, '']]
  MultiAZEnabled: !Equals [!Ref MultiAZ, 'true']
  RdsDeletionProtectionEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableDeletionProtectionRDS, 'true']
  AlbDeletionProtectionEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableDeletionProtectionALB, 'true']

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-public-az1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-public-az2'

  PrivateAppSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-private-app-az1'

  PrivateAppSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-private-app-az2'

  PrivateDbSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-private-db-az1'

  PrivateDbSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-private-db-az2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-public-rt'

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatEip:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-nat-eip'

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-natgw'

  PrivateAppRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-private-app-rt'

  PrivateDbRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-private-db-rt'

  PrivateAppDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateDbDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateAppSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable

  PrivateAppSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable

  PrivateDbSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable

  PrivateDbSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable

  AlbSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: ALB security group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-alb-sg'

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: App instance security group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref AppPort
          ToPort: !Ref AppPort
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-app-sg'

  AppSshIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Condition: AllowSSH
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocationCIDR

  DbSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: RDS security group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !If [IsPostgres, 5432, 3306]
          ToPort: !If [IsPostgres, 5432, 3306]
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-db-sg'

  AppBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If
        - UseFixedBucketName
        - !Ref S3BucketName
        - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-bucket'

  AppBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AppBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTLS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${AppBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${AppBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  Alb:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-alb'
      Scheme: !Ref PublicAlbScheme
      Type: application
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: deletion_protection.enabled
          Value: !If [AlbDeletionProtectionEnabled, 'true', 'false']

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-tg'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Protocol: HTTP
      Port: !Ref AppPort
      TargetType: instance
      HealthCheckEnabled: true
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      HealthCheckPath: /
      Matcher:
        HttpCode: '200-399'

  HttpListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref Alb
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup

  IamRoleApp:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-app-role-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-app-s3'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt AppBucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub '${AppBucket.Arn}/*'

  IamInstanceProfileApp:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-app-profile-${AWS::StackName}'
      Roles:
        - !Ref IamRoleApp

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lt-${AWS::StackName}'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !If [UseKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt IamInstanceProfileApp.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref AppSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp3
              VolumeSize: 20
              Encrypted: true
              DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -euxo pipefail
            yum -y update || true
            if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf -y install nginx || true; else yum -y install nginx || true; fi
            systemctl enable nginx
            cat >/usr/share/nginx/html/index.html <<'EOF'
            <html><body><h1>${ProjectName}-${Environment}</h1><p>OK</p></body></html>
            EOF
            systemctl restart nginx

  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref DesiredCapacity
      MinSize: !Ref MinSize
      MaxSize: !Ref MaxSize
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref TargetGroup
      HealthCheckType: ELB
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 120
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-app'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  DbSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-db-subnets'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateDbSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-db-subnet-group'

  DbParameterGroupPostgres:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Condition: IsPostgres
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-pg-params'
      Family: postgres15
      Parameters:
        rds.force_ssl: '0'

  DbParameterGroupMySql:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Condition: !Not [!Condition IsPostgres]
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-mysql-params'
      Family: mysql8.0
      Parameters: {}

  DbInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Snapshot
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Snapshot
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-db'
      Engine: !Ref DbEngine
      EngineVersion: !If [IsPostgres, !Ref DbEngineVersionPostgres, !Ref DbEngineVersionMySql]
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DbInstanceClass
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref DbAllocatedStorage
      StorageType: gp3
      StorageEncrypted: true
      MultiAZ: !If [MultiAZEnabled, true, false]
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBName: !Ref DbName
      MasterUsername: !Ref DbMasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref DbMasterPassword
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DbSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DbSubnetGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !If
        - IsPostgres
        - !Ref DbParameterGroupPostgres
        - !Ref DbParameterGroupMySql
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !If [MultiAZEnabled, 7, 1]
      DeletionProtection: !If [RdsDeletionProtectionEnabled, true, false]
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
  PrivateAppSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateAppSubnet1, !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2]]
  PrivateDbSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateDbSubnet1, !Ref PrivateDbSubnet2]]

  LoadBalancerDNSName:
    Value: !GetAtt Alb.DNSName
  TargetGroupArn:
    Value: !Ref TargetGroup

  S3BucketNameOut:
    Value: !Ref AppBucket
  S3BucketArn:
    Value: !GetAtt AppBucket.Arn

  RdsEndpointAddress:
    Value: !GetAtt DbInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RdsEndpointPort:
    Value: !GetAtt DbInstance.Endpoint.Port
  RdsDbName:
    Value: !Ref DbName
